description: In sign_sync (lib.rs:73), the panic handler binds a local `msg: &str` inside the closure while the function parameter `msg: &[u8]` is still in scope. A reader scanning the panic handler sees `msg` and must check which `msg` is meant. The shadowing is harmless at runtime but forces a re-read. Fix: rename the local to `panic_msg` or similar.
title: sign_sync: 'msg' variable shadows outer param
